visit_info.title: Nuka Cola Plant
content: This facility is a stunning accomplishment by the creative minds at the Nuka-Cola Corporation. We use cutting edge equipment to keep the world's most popular soft drink in full production 24 hours a day.
This unit prides itself on over 457 days without a single death or major limb loss of any personnel.
The Nuka-Cola plant, officially the D.C. Nuka-Cola Bottling Facility, is a large, three-story factory building located at the southern edge of the Capital Wasteland.

visit_info.title: Nuka Cola World
content: Take a trip to Nuka-World, a vast amusement park now a lawless city of Raiders.

Explore an all region with an open wasteland and park zones like Safari Adventure, Dry Rock Gulch, Kiddie Kingdom, and the Galactic Zone. Lead lethal gangs of Raiders and use them to conquer settlements, bending the Commonwealth to your will.

Opened on May 1, 2050, Bradberton decided to open an amusement park dedicated to the soft drink. Nuka-World was incredibly popular with the American public, and as of 2077 it had been breaking its visitor attendance records for four consecutive years, which was attributed to Galactic Zone.
